summary: There is no evidence linking yeast prions directly to studies of human amyloid diseases; while both involve protein misfolding, the provided information only discusses antifungal drug actions unrelated to prion-based modeling. Thus, yeast prions do not serve as significant models for understanding human amyloid pathologies based on this context.
